title: After an item was moved through an automation from one board to another, my subitems disappeared, although the subitem count remains visible. Additionally, I am able to add new subitems, and the count is increasing
excerpt: After an item was moved through an automation from one board to another, my subitems disappeared, although the subitem count remains visible. Additionally, I am able to add new subitems, and the count is increasing.

posts.author: knikou (Konstantinos Nikou)
posts.cookedHtml: After an item was moved through an automation from one board to another, my subitems disappeared, although the subitem count remains visible. Additionally, I am able to add new subitems, and the count is increasing.

posts.author: shayan.moussawi (Shayan Moussawi)
posts.cookedHtml: You have to make sure that both Boards subitem columns have the same comumn names

posts.author: knikou (Konstantinos Nikou)
posts.cookedHtml: The Item is already transferred. The columns are not the same. Is there a way to see the subitems? I don’t need the missing info from the missing columns.
